sentences.target: Je me débrouille avec le vieux vélo.
sentences.reading: /ʒə mə de.bʁuj avɛk lə vjø ve.lo/

translations.fr: Je me débrouille avec le vieux vélo.
translations.ipa: /ʒə mə de.bʁuj avɛk lə vjø ve.lo/
translations.en: I'm managing with the old bike.
translations.es: Me las arreglo con la bicicleta vieja.
translations.de: Ich komme mit dem alten Fahrrad zurecht.
translations.it: Me la cavo con la vecchia bicicletta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我能用这辆旧自行车应付过去。
translations.yue: 我用呢部舊單車頂住先。
translations.pt: Estou me virando com a bicicleta velha.
translations.vi: Tôi xoay xở với chiếc xe đạp cũ.
translations.nl: Ik red me met de oude fiets.
translations.uk: Я даю собі раду зі старим велосипедом.
translations.hi: मैं पुरानी साइकिल से काम चला रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Τα καταφέρνω με το παλιό ποδήλατο.
translations.nb: Jeg klarer meg med den gamle sykkelen.
translations.id: Aku masih bisa bertahan dengan sepeda tua itu.
translations.sv: Jag klarar mig med den gamla cykeln.
translations.da: Jeg klarer mig med den gamle cykel.
translations.ja: 古い自転車でなんとかやっている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; performs the action of the verb.
Clitic reflexive/object pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the pronominal use of the verb (se débrouiller).
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; pronominal construction with “me”.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiners the noun “vélo”.
Adjective, masculine singular; modifies “vélo”.
Common noun, masculine singular; object inside the PP headed by “avec”.

sentences.target: Débrouille-toi avec ce client, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /de.bʁuj.twa avɛk sə klijɑ̃ sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Débrouille-toi avec ce client, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /de.bʁuj.twa avɛk sə klijɑ̃ sil tə plɛ/
translations.es: Encárgate de este cliente, por favor.
translations.de: Kümmere dich bitte um diesen Kunden.
translations.it: Occupati di questo cliente, per favore.
translations.zh-Hans: 请你接待一下这位顾客。
translations.vi: Làm ơn xử lý khách này.
translations.hi: कृपया इस ग्राहक को संभाल लो.
translations.el: Σε παρακαλώ, ανέλαβε αυτόν τον πελάτη.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, ta deg av denne kunden.
translations.sv: Snälla, ta hand om den här kunden.
translations.ro: Te rog, ocupă-te de acest client.
translations.cs: Prosím, postarej se o tohoto zákazníka.
translations.da: Vær sød at tage dig af denne kunde.
translations.fi: Ole kiltti ja hoida tämä asiakas.
translations.ja: このお客さんの対応をお願いね。

tokens.explanation: Main verb, imperative, 2nd person singular; gives a command.
Tonic/reflexive pronoun used with imperative to form the pronominal command (Débrouille-toi).
Preposition introducing the complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies “client”.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition “avec”.
Subordinating conjunction elided before vowel (si → s'); introduces the clause “s' il te plaît”.
Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of “plaît”.
Clitic indirect object pronoun, 2nd person singular; complement of “plaît”.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; in the idiom “s'il te plaît” (‘please’).

sentences.target: Ils se débrouillent sans mode d'emploi.

translations.fr: Ils se débrouillent sans mode d'emploi.
translations.es: Se las arreglan sin el manual.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们没有说明书也能搞定。
translations.pt: Eles se viram sem o manual.
translations.vi: Họ xoay xở được không cần hướng dẫn.
translations.ar: هم يتدبرون أمرهم بدون كتيب تعليمات.
translations.uk: Вони дають собі раду без інструкції.
translations.hi: वे बिना निर्देशिका के काम चला लेते हैं.
translations.id: Mereka bisa mengatasinya tanpa buku petunjuk.
translations.ja: 彼らは説明書がなくても何とかなる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural; performs the action of the verb.
Reflexive clitic pronoun, 3rd person; marks pronominal use of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; pronominal construction with “se”.
Preposition introducing a complement indicating absence.
Common noun; head of the compound noun phrase “mode d'emploi” (‘user manual’).
Preposition elided before vowel; introduces the complement “emploi” in the compound “mode d'emploi”.
Common noun; complement of “de” within the fixed expression “mode d'emploi”.

sentences.target: On va devoir se débrouiller ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va də.vwaʁ sə de.bʁuje sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On va devoir se débrouiller ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va də.vwaʁ sə de.bʁuje sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We're going to have to manage tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche vamos a tener que apañarnos.
translations.de: Heute Abend werden wir zurechtkommen müssen.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚我们得自己想办法应付。
translations.yue: 我哋今晚要自己諗辦法頂住先。
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vamos ter que nos virar.
translations.tr: Bu akşam idare etmek zorunda kalacağız.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng ta sẽ phải tự xoay xở.
translations.nl: Vanavond zullen we het zelf moeten redden.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері нам доведеться давати собі раду.
translations.hu: Ma este meg kell oldanunk valahogy.
translations.hi: आज रात हमें किसी तरह काम चलाना होगा.
translations.pl: Dziś wieczorem będziemy musieli sobie poradzić.
translations.el: Σήμερα το βράδυ θα πρέπει να τα καταφέρουμε.
translations.nb: I kveld må vi klare oss.
translations.id: Malam ini kita harus bisa mengatasinya.
translations.ro: Diseară va trebui să ne descurcăm.
translations.cs: Dnes večer si budeme muset nějak poradit.
translations.da: I aften må vi klare os.
translations.ja: 今夜はどうにかやりくりしないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used colloquially for ‘we’; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms near-future periphrasis with an infinitive.
Main lexical verb, infinitive; indicates obligation in the periphrastic future (“va devoir”).
Reflexive clitic pronoun associated with the infinitive “débrouiller”.
Infinitive verb; complements “devoir” to express what must be done (se débrouiller).
Demonstrative determiner; modifies the temporal noun “soir”.
Common noun; temporal complement specifying when the action occurs.
